[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up photo shows a person’s face in soft indoor lighting, facing slightly to the side with their eyes down.

Main Subject:
The main subject is a person shown from the upper face down to the upper chest area, with short dark hair and a neutral expression; their eyes appear closed or lowered, and their lips are relaxed. A small dark mark or shadowing is visible near the chin, and their head is turned slightly toward the left side of the image.

Setting:
The background appears to be an indoor wall with a pale color, and part of a doorframe or vertical edge is visible on the left side. Lighting is soft and even, with no visible outdoor elements.

Visual Details:
The person’s skin tone is medium to warm, with visible facial features including eyebrows, eyelids, and a slight shadow under the chin. The clothing visible is a solid red top. The camera angle is close and slightly above or at face level, with the face filling most of the frame; the image has a somewhat soft focus and muted contrast.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a close-up of a person wearing a red shirt against a pale indoor wall. Their head is turned slightly to the left and their eyes appear closed or looking downward.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

[No readable text present in the screenshot.]

# Structured Version

- [No text detected—only a person’s photo.]

# Notes

- The screenshot appears to contain only an image with no visible words, UI elements, or readable text.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
